class.cursors:
DEFAULT_CURSOR(wg nazwy,strNazwa)
CRSR_CHOICELIST_WG_TYPU_OBIEKTOW wg typu obiektow
nTypeId=appvarChoicelistTypeId strNazwa
CRSR_CHOICELIST_WYKONAWCY wykonawcy
nTypeId=TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK or nTypeId=TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK or nTypeId=TYPEID_N5KLIENT strNazwa
CRSR_CHOICELIST_WG_TYPU_OBIEKTOW_I_USERA wg typu obiektow i uzytkownika
(nTypeId=appvarChoicelistTypeId)
strNazwa
class.script:
'getCurrentUser #include "50203"
'remove_SecurityObject_save #include "50626"
function choicelist_load_choicelist(byref pHS )', byval bWithCheck , byref pOrderElems)
pHS.empty dim elem dim crs ' if not bWithCheck then ' bez sprawdzania for each elem in this_.listElement pHS.add this_.nTypeId, elem.idElement ' pOrderElems.add elem.idElement next ' else ' sprawdzamy czy obiekt docelowy istnieje ' dim strTableName:strTableName = stdobjdef_.getobjdef(this_.nTypeId).tablename ' dim strQuery:strQuery = trans_.afc.convert.formatter ( _ ' "select " + _ ' "%1.idobj as id " + _ ' "from " + _ ' "vlist_choicelist_listElement as list " + _ ' "join %1 on list.c_idelement = %1.idobj " + _ ' "where " + _ ' "p_idobj = %2 " + _ ' "order by coll_lp") _ ' .add(strTableName) _ ' .add(cstr(this_.idobj)) _ ' .done ' ' dim rs:set rs = trans_.createadors(strQuery) ' while not rs.eof ' pHS.add this_.nTypeId, clng(rs.fields("id").value) ' if not pOrderElems is nothing then'this_.eDynamic = N5CHOICELIST_DYNAMIC_ZACHOWAJ then ' pOrderElems.add clng(rs.fields("id").value) ' end if ' rs.movenext ' wend ' end if
end function
function choicelist_add_replace_element_to_list(byref pos , byval elem)
if not this_.listElement.exists(pos) then this_.listElement.addnew end if
dim oElem:set oElem = this_.listElement.get(pos) if not oElem is nothing then oElem.idElement = elem pos = pos + 1 end if
end function
function choicelist_save_choicelist(byref pHS , byref pOrderElems)
dim s,lo,hi dim iter : iter = 1
if this_.eDynamic = N5CHOICELIST_DYNAMIC_ZACHOWAJ then
dim pHS_added : set pHS_added = createobject("navocomutil.hyperset")
dim iter2 for iter2=0 to pOrderElems.UpperIndex()
if pHS.exists(this_.nTypeId , clng(pOrderElems.value(iter2)) ) and not pHS_added.exists(this_.nTypeId , clng(pOrderElems.value(iter2)) ) then pHS_added.add this_.nTypeId,clng(pOrderElems.value(iter2)) this_.choicelist_add_replace_element_to_list iter , clng(pOrderElems.value(iter2)) end if next
else
for each s in pHS pHS.extract s,hi,lo this_.choicelist_add_replace_element_to_list iter , lo next
end if
'usuń nadmiarowe elementy listy while this_.listElement.exists(iter) this_.listElement.delete(iter) wend end function
function choicelist_initnew() if trans_.var(GVAR_OPERATION_MODE) <> clng(OPERATION_MODE_IMPORT) then this_.nTypeId = trans_.var(APPVAR_CHOICELIST_TYPEID) end if choicelist_initnew = true end function
function choicelist_as_text() choicelist_as_text=this_.strNazwa end function
function checkChoiceList():checkChoiceList=false dim nChoiceList nChoiceList=trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_CHOICELIST, "nTypeId=" + CStr(this_.nTypeId) + _ " and IdObj <>" + CStr(this_.idobj) + " and strNazwa='" + trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(this_.strNazwa) + "'")
if (nChoiceList<>0) then trans_.message 65014, 0, "Istnieje już lista wyboru o podanej nazwie dla podanego obiektu." exit function end if
checkChoiceList=true end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' BEFORE INSERT '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function choicelist_befins(): choicelist_befins = false
'Sprawdzamy czy obiekt ma być chroniony if (this_.nIsSecurity = 1) then
'Dodajemy obiekty uprawnien if (not choicelist_InsertSOD()) then exit function end if
end if
if (not checkChoiceList()) then exit function end if
choicelist_befins = true end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' BEFORE UPDATE '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function choicelist_befupd(): choicelist_befupd = false
if (this_.old_nIsSecurity = 0 and this_.nIsSecurity = 1) then
'Zmiana z 'nie' na 'tak'. Obiekt staje sie chroniony a 'wczesniej nie byl
if (not choicelist_InsertSOD()) then exit function end if
end if
if (this_.old_nIsSecurity = 1 and this_.nIsSecurity = 0) then
'Jeżeli zmienił się z 'tak' na 'nie' 'Usuwamy obiekty security skojarzone z naszym obiekten
if (not remove_SecurityObject_save(THIS_FILE, this_.IdObj)) then exit function end if
end if
if (not checkChoiceList()) then exit function end if
choicelist_befupd = true end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' BEFORE DELETE '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function choicelist_befdel(): choicelist_befdel = false
'Usuwamy obiekty security skojarzone z naszym obiekten if (not remove_SecurityObject_save(THIS_FILE, this_.IdObj)) then exit function end if
choicelist_befdel = true end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Wstawiamy obiekty security (nasz obiekt jest chroniony) '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function choicelist_InsertSOD() choicelist_InsertSOD = insert_SecurityObject_save("Lista wyboru", _ this_.strNazwa, this_.IdObj, THIS_FILE, "IdObj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID())) end function
'dodawać nowe elementy należy tą funkcja - sprawdza ona, czy juz przypadkiem 'taki element na liscie sie nie znajduje function choicelist_addnew(byval idElement) choicelist_addnew = false if choicelist_exists(idElement) then trans_.message 7000,0,"Nie można dodać elementu gdyż istnieje już on na wybranej liście" exit function end if dim pNew:set pNew = this_.listElement.addnew pNew.idElement = idElement choicelist_addnew = true end function
'sprawdzanie, czy dany element juz w liscie nie istnieje function choicelist_exists(byval idElement) choicelist_exists = true dim rs:set rs = trans_.createadors(trans_.afc.convert.Formatter("select * from vlist_choicelist_listelement where p_idobj = %1 and c_idelement = %2").add(cstr(this_.idobj)).add(cstr(idElement)).done()) if not rs.eof then exit function end if choicelist_exists = false end function
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------------- function choicelist_append_array(byref oNXArray,byval iStartPos) dim iter for iter = 0 to oNXArray.upper_index if this_.listElement.exists(iter + iStartPos) then this_.listElement.get(iter + iStartPos).idElement = oNXArray(iter) else this_.listElement.addnew().idElement = oNXArray(iter) end if next while this_.listElement.exists(iter + iStartPos) this_.listElement.delete(iter + iStartPos) wend end function
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' converts choice list elements to nx array #comment '-------------------------------------------------------------- function choicelist_to_array() dim oNXArray : set oNXArray = nx_.new_array() dim oElement for each oElement in this_.listElement oNXArray.add clng(oElement.idElement) next set choicelist_to_array = oNXArray end function
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' set choice list elements from nx array #comment '-------------------------------------------------------------- function choicelist_from_unique_array(byref oNXArray) choicelist_append_array oNXArray,1 end function #comment '--------------------------------------------------------------
